name: Salt AG Grid Theme
description: CSS theme that maps AG Grid's visual layer to Salt Design System tokens. Applied via CSS class names on the grid container — not a React wrapper component.

variantClasses.ag-theme-salt-variant-secondary: Secondary background variant (additive — combine with a theme class)
variantClasses.ag-theme-salt-variant-tertiary: Tertiary background variant (additive — combine with a theme class)
variantClasses.ag-theme-salt-variant-zebra: Alternating row backgrounds (additive — combine with a theme class)

icons.--ag-icon-font-family: salt-icons (custom icon font bundled with the theme)
icons.--ag-icon-image-display: none (disabled — Salt uses font icons instead)

cellStyling.display: inline-block (inherited from AG Grid base CSS — see knownIssues)

editableCellClasses.editable-cell: Required on any editable column via cellClass — renders the border outline
editableCellClasses.numeric-cell: Add alongside editable-cell for numeric columns
editableCellClasses.error-cell: Validation error state (red border + dot indicator)
editableCellClasses.warning-cell: Validation warning state (orange border + dot indicator)
editableCellClasses.success-cell: Validation success state (green border + dot indicator)

rowValidationClasses.error-row: Full-row error state (applied via rowClassRules or getRowClass)

knownIssues.summary: Cell content sits at the top of the row instead of being vertically centered
knownIssues.cause: AG Grid base CSS sets .ag-cell to display: inline-block. The Salt theme sets line-height: calc(var(--ag-line-height) - 1px) but does not override the display property. The combination of inline-block + the 1px line-height offset causes content to not vertically center, especially at non-default densities.

checkboxSelection.description: AG Grid renders row selection checkboxes using a custom checkbox styled by the Salt theme. The checkbox size is controlled by --salt-size-selectable. Column width must be density-aware.
checkboxSelection.checkboxSize: var(--salt-size-selectable) — varies by density: high=12px, medium=14px, low=16px, touch=18px
checkboxSelection.cellPadding: var(--salt-spacing-100) — varies by density: high=4px, medium=8px, low=12px, touch=16px

compactDensityOverride.description: Compact theme classes override --salt-size-base to 16px and --salt-size-selectable to 12px, producing tighter rows regardless of the Salt density context

accessibility.keyboard: AG Grid handles keyboard navigation natively (arrow keys, Tab, Enter for editing)
accessibility.aria: AG Grid sets aria-selected on selected rows. Ensure custom cell renderers preserve semantic meaning.
